title: PharmEasy Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: PharmEasy Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the PharmEasy Ventures Solutions family as a Full Stack Developer in Ranchi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About PharmEasy Ventures Solutions:
PharmEasy Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PharmEasy Ventures Solutions!
